resolvedQuestions.answer: The target layout is sound if runtime remains nested infrastructure with no mode-registry entry and only one top-level graph-metadata.json.
The directional path rule is mostly correct, but the execution plan misses artifact-root/system-spec-kit code seams and several reverse-coupling files.
The external migration must be category-scoped and must re-baseline advisor accuracy, not just rename strings.
Wire GLM to MiMo fallback only with explicit approval, canonical model-id mapping, and failure classification that can reach the router on quota/auth/timeout cases.
Detached fan-out lineage prompts conflict with YAML spec.md mutation steps; fan-out lineages need an explicit skip/defer branch.

keyFindings.title: Detached fan-out lineage boundary conflicts with research YAML spec.md mutations
keyFindings.summary: The lineage prompt says writes must stay inside the lineage directory, but deep_research_auto.yaml still edits spec_folder/spec.md during pre-init and post-synthesis. This can violate fan-out isolation or force each detached child to improvise a skip.

keyFindings.title: artifact-root.cjs is a missed system-spec-kit path seam
keyFindings.summary: After runtime moves under system-deep-loop/runtime, artifact-root.cjs's relative require to system-spec-kit needs one more parent hop. Its test constant and dependency-seams guard also need updates or the validation surface becomes misleading.

keyFindings.title: Reverse-coupling inventory is broader than the current table
keyFindings.summary: The child 002 plan table is directionally right but incomplete. It should explicitly include research/review runtime-capability shims, review reducer, replay-graph absolute lookup, deep-improvement runtime self-profile, and runtime tests with workflow-relative imports.

keyFindings.title: Advisor migration needs drift-guard plus accuracy re-baseline
keyFindings.summary: The merged deep-loop identity is encoded in Python, TypeScript aliases, mode-registry projection tests, corpus rows, and approved divergence ledger entries. Rename must preserve the projection hash and meet the pre-change routing-accuracy baseline.

keyFindings.title: GLM to MiMo fallback is useful but not a one-line call-site
keyFindings.summary: fallback-router.ts is tested and has no non-test caller. Wiring it should happen, but only after a canonical id map, approved fallback target policy, and retry/fatal failure-class handling are designed.

ruledOutDirections: Do not add runtime as a new workflowMode; runtime is infrastructure.
Do not blindly replace every historical spec/worktree mention of old skill ids.
Do not wire fallback only at retry-exhaustion without handling fatal quota/auth exits.
Do not let detached lineages mutate spec.md outside their artifact_dir.
